title: Zapf
extendedDescription: Zapf is a tool for zapping any user on the internet, supporting a wide range of platforms and protocols.
installGuide: Connect your Lokihub to Zapf to enable seamless zapping to any internet user directly from your node.

title: Zapf for Telegram
extendedDescription: Zapf for Telegram is a bot integration that lets you zap any user directly from your Telegram chats, powered by your own Lokihub node.
installGuide: Connect your Lokihub to Zapf for Telegram to enable seamless zapping directly from your Telegram chats.

title: Zapf for Discord
extendedDescription: Zapf for Discord is a bot integration that lets you zap any user directly from your Discord server, powered by your own Lokihub node.
installGuide: Connect your Lokihub to Zapf for Discord to enable seamless zapping directly from your Discord server.
